name: EONIA (Euro OverNight Index Average)
description_short: Historical data on EONIA, the euro overnight interest rate benchmark that was replaced by €STR in 2022. Provides the daily unsecured overnight lending rate between euro area banks.
use_cases: What was the historical path of EONIA before its discontinuation?
How did EONIA respond to ECB policy rate changes?
What was the spread between EONIA and the ECB deposit facility rate?
